constraints.layout_style: table rows with inputs in td cells

required_complexity_patterns.notes: Label text split across multiple spans with no space between words
Apply form hosted inside iframe or srcdoc iframe shell
When combobox widget requested, use custom listbox - native select alone is insufficient
Inputs laid out in table cells, not flex card stacks only
Fields inside details/summary or hidden until click

reference_templates.title: Search type for name
reference_templates.notes: Name field uses input type=search instead of text
reference_templates.dom_excerpt: Search type name

reference_templates.title: Micro1 Q label pattern
reference_templates.notes: micro1-inspired step-2 labels like Q2.full name with dot separator
reference_templates.dom_excerpt: Micro1 Q labels

reference_templates.title: Duplicate name attributes
reference_templates.notes: Two distinct fields share the same name attribute (invalid but seen in the wild)
reference_templates.dom_excerpt: Duplicate name attributes

prompt_summary: Create a messy, production-real ashby-style job application (single-page, small, tier=high). Widgets: combobox. Required: Label text split across multiple spans with no space between words Required: Apply form hosted inside iframe or srcdoc iframe shell Required: When combobox widget requested, use custom listbox - native select alone is insufficient Required: Inputs laid out in table cells, not flex card stacks only Required: Fields inside details/summary or hidden until click Reference DOM (Search type for name): Name field uses input type=search instead of text Reference DOM (Micro1 Q label pattern): micro1-inspired step-2 labels like Q2.full name with dot separator Reference DOM (Duplicate name attributes): Two distinct fields share the same name attribute (invalid but seen in the wild) Do NOT produce a tutorial-style form where every field is label[for]+native input. Mix native controls with non-semantic production DOM from the patterns below. Implement ALL required complexity patterns: glued-label-text, iframe-apply, native-select-not-combobox, table-layout, details-accordion. Include at least one custom widget (div role=textbox, pill buttons, or listbox combobox). Include at least one labeling strategy besides label-for (aria-label, aria-labelledby, glued spans, placeholder-only). Layout: table rows with inputs in td cells. Avoid generic centered SaaS card as the only structure. High tier: include shadow DOM host OR iframe apply shell OR wizard/conditional reveal with hidden fields. Mirror structural messiness like these references: Search type for name; Micro1 Q label pattern; Duplicate name attributes.
